allow: PowerShell(node -e "eval\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('c:/Users/kidds/RS3 Quest Helper/quests.js','utf8'\)\); console.log\('quests loaded:', QUESTS.length, '| steps:', QUESTS[0].sections.reduce\(\(n,s\)=>n+s.steps.length,0\)\)")

PowerShell($cmds = 'python','py','npx','deno','bun'; foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $found = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($found\) { Write-Output "$c => $\($found.Source\)" } }; if \(Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"\) { Write-Output "edge => found" } elseif \(Test-Path "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"\) { Write-Output "edge => found \(x86\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden python -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','8090','--directory','c:\\Users\\kidds\\RS3 Quest Helper'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/appconfig.json\).StatusCode)

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/appconfig.json\).StatusCode } catch { Write-Output "still down: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-dom.html" -Raw; @\('A Christmas Reunion','Fully build the three piles of planks','Chat: Accept','0 / 9','Aoife','alt1-banner','Enter "1", "2", and "2"'\) | ForEach-Object { "{0} : {1}" -f \($dom.Contains\($_\)\), $_ })

PowerShell($p = "c:\\Users\\kidds\\RS3 Quest Helper\\app.js"; $c = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p\); $tab=[char]9; $bs=[char]92; $q=[char]34; $old = $tab + 'var CHAT_OPEN = ' + $q + [char]1 + $q + ', CHAT_CLOSE = ' + $q + [char]2 + $q + ', NEEDED_MARK = ' + $q + [char]3 + $q + ';'; $new = $tab + 'var CHAT_OPEN = ' + $q + $bs + 'u0001' + $q + ', CHAT_CLOSE = ' + $q + $bs + 'u0002' + $q + ', NEEDED_MARK = ' + $q + $bs + 'u0003' + $q + ';'; if \($c.Contains\($old\)\) { $c = $c.Replace\($old, $new\); [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $c, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false\)\); 'replaced' } else { 'NOT FOUND' })

PowerShell(Remove-Item "c:\\Users\\kidds\\RS3 Quest Helper\\quests.js" -Confirm:$false; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:8090/index.html\).StatusCode } catch { "server down" })

PowerShell(cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=15000 http://localhost:8090/index.html > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-home.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-home.html" -Raw; "size: $\($dom.Length\)"; "rows: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'quest-row'\)\).Count\)"; @\('A Christmas Reunion','Dragon Slayer','While Guthix Sleeps','quest-list'\) | ForEach-Object { "{0} : {1}" -f $dom.Contains\($_\), $_ })

PowerShell(cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=20000 `"http://localhost:8090/index.html?quest=A+Christmas+Reunion`" > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-g1.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-g1.html" -Raw; "steps: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'class=.step[ \\x22]'\)\).Count\)"; if \($dom -match '\\d+ / \\d+'\) { "progress: $\($Matches[0]\)" }; @\('Chat: Accept','Fully build the three','Aoife','Talking to Cait or Diango','split fir logs'\) | ForEach-Object { "{0} : {1}" -f $dom.Contains\($_\), $_ })

PowerShell(foreach \($q in @\('Dragon+Slayer','While+Guthix+Sleeps','The+Restless+Ghost'\)\) { cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=20000 `"http://localhost:8090/index.html?quest=$q`" > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-t.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-t.html" -Raw; $steps = \([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'class=.step[ \\x22]'\)\).Count; $sections = \([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'section-title'\)\).Count; $chips = \([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'Chat: '\)\).Count; $noParse = $dom.Contains\('no parseable steps'\); "$q => steps: $steps, sections: $sections, chat chips: $chips, unparseable: $noParse" })

PowerShell(cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=20000 `"http://localhost:8090/index.html?quest=Dragon+Slayer`" > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-ds.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-ds.html" -Raw; "braces: $\($dom.Contains\('{{'\)\)"; "brackets: $\($dom.Contains\('[['\)\)"; "sentinel leak: $\($dom.Contains\('@@'\)\)"; "table leak: $\($dom.Contains\('%%TABLE'\)\)"; $m = [regex]::Matches\($dom, '<div class="step-text">\([^<]{10,120}\)'\); $m | Select-Object -First 12 | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value })

PowerShell(git clone --depth 1 https://codeberg.org/JasperSurmont/bolt-questhelper.git "$env:TEMP\\claude\\bolt-questhelper" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP\\claude\\bolt-questhelper" | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($r = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\bolt-questhelper"; Get-Content "$r\\LICENSE" -TotalCount 5; ""; Get-ChildItem "$r\\quests" | Select-Object -First 20 Name; ""; \(Get-ChildItem "$r\\quests" -Recurse -File | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell($f = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\bolt-questhelper\\quests\\a-shadow-over-ashdale.lua"; $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($f\); "total lines: $\(\(Get-Content $f | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)"; ""; Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP\\claude\\bolt-questhelper\\scripts" -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:TEMP\\claude\\bolt-questhelper\\core" | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(foreach \($q in @\('Dragon+Slayer','While+Guthix+Sleeps','Cook''s+Assistant'\)\) { cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=20000 `"http://localhost:8090/index.html?quest=$q`" > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-t.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-t.html" -Raw; "$q => steps: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'class=.step[ \\x22]'\)\).Count\), map chips: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'chip-map'\)\).Count\), leak: $\($dom.Contains\('@@'\)\)" }; cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --screenshot=`"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-maps.png`" --window-size=500,650 --virtual-time-budget=20000 `"http://localhost:8090/index.html?quest=A+Christmas+Reunion`" 2>nul")

PowerShell($d = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\alt1pkg"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://registry.npmjs.org/alt1/-/alt1-0.1.3.tgz" -OutFile "$d\\alt1.tgz"; tar -xzf "$d\\alt1.tgz" -C $d; Get-ChildItem "$d\\package" | Select-Object Name; ""; Get-ChildItem "$d\\package\\dist" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30 Name)

PowerShell($d = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\alt1pkg\\package\\dist"; Get-ChildItem "$d\\dialog","$d\\base","$d\\ocr","$d\\fonts" | Select-Object @{n='path';e={$_.Directory.Name + '/' + $_.Name}}, Length; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\claude\\alt1pkg\\package\\package.json" | Select-String -Pattern '"main"|"browser"|"module"' | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($d = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\alt1pkg\\package\\dist"; Get-Content "$d\\dialog\\index.js" -TotalCount 3; "---"; Get-Content "$d\\base\\index.js" -TotalCount 3; "---"; Get-Content "$d\\dialog\\index.js" | Select-String -Pattern 'require\\\(|module.exports|__webpack|define\\\(' | Select-Object -First 8)

PowerShell($d = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\alt1pkg\\package\\dist"; Get-Content "$d\\dialog\\index.js" -TotalCount 12; "==="; Get-Content "$d\\windowexports.d.ts"; "==="; Get-Content "$d\\ocr\\index.js" -TotalCount 10 | Select-String 'root\\['; Get-Content "$d\\base\\index.js" -TotalCount 12 | Select-String 'root\\[')

PowerShell($src = "$env:TEMP\\claude\\alt1pkg\\package"; $dst = "c:\\Users\\kidds\\RS3 Quest Helper\\libs"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dst | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$src\\dist\\base\\index.js" "$dst\\a1lib.js"; Copy-Item "$src\\dist\\ocr\\index.js" "$dst\\ocr.js"; Copy-Item "$src\\dist\\dialog\\index.js" "$dst\\dialog.js"; Copy-Item "$src\\dist\\chatbox\\index.js" "$dst\\chatbox.js"; Get-ChildItem $dst | Select-Object Name, Length; \(Get-Content "$src\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).license)

PowerShell(cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=20000 `"http://localhost:8090/index.html?quest=A+Christmas+Reunion`" > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-r.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-r.html" -Raw; "steps: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'class=.step[ \\x22]'\)\).Count\)"; "map chips: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'chip-map'\)\).Count\)"; "assist button: $\($dom.Contains\('Assist: off'\)\)"; "banner: $\($dom.Contains\('add this app to Alt1'\)\)")

PowerShell(cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=15000 http://localhost:8090/test.html > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-t3.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-t3.html" -Raw; if \($dom -match 'ALL TESTS PASSED'\) { 'ALL TESTS PASSED' } elseif \($dom -match '\(\\d+\) FAILED'\) { $Matches[0] } else { 'no result' })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://apps.runescape.com/runemetrics/quests?user=Kiddsh_GIM" -Headers @{Origin='http://localhost:8090'}; "status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "CORS: $\($r.Headers['Access-Control-Allow-Origin']\)"; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "quests returned: $\($j.quests.Count\)"; $j.quests | Select-Object -First 5 title, status, difficulty, members, userEligible | Format-Table)

PowerShell($target = 'https://apps.runescape.com/runemetrics/quests?user=Kiddsh_GIM'; $enc = [uri]::EscapeDataString\($target\); foreach \($p in @\("https://api.codetabs.com/v1/proxy?quest=$enc", "https://corsproxy.io/?url=$enc", "https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=$enc"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing $p -Headers @{Origin='http://localhost:8090'} -TimeoutSec 15; $cors = $r.Headers['Access-Control-Allow-Origin']; $ok = $r.Content.StartsWith\('{"quests"'\); "$\($p.Split\('/'\)[2]\) => status $\($r.StatusCode\), CORS: '$cors', json: $ok" } catch { "$\($p.Split\('/'\)[2]\) => FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\("`n"\)[0]\)" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 64,64; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.SmoothingMode = 'AntiAlias'; $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255,38,44,38\)\); $pen = New-Object System.Drawing.Pen \([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(255,127,255,80\)\), 3; $pts = @\(\(New-Object System.Drawing.Point 32,12\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Point 56,32\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Point 32,52\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Point 8,32\)\); $g.DrawPolygon\($pen, $pts\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("c:\\Users\\kidds\\RS3 Quest Helper\\icon-tile.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); "icon created")

PowerShell(cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --screenshot=`"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-tile.png`" --window-size=280,360 --virtual-time-budget=5000 http://localhost:8090/tile.html 2>nul"; cmd /c "`"${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe`" --headless --disable-gpu --dump-dom --virtual-time-budget=5000 http://localhost:8090/tile.html > `"%TEMP%\\rs3qh-tiled.html`" 2>nul"; $dom = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rs3qh-tiled.html" -Raw; "marker btn: $\($dom.Contains\('Marker: off'\)\)"; "add link: $\($dom.Contains\('appconfig-tile.json'\)\)"; "swatches: $\(\([regex]::Matches\($dom, 'class=.swatch'\)\).Count\)")
